title: Missing Content Register
description: Records content on the source site that was not yet added to nav.plain.html. Hook blocks until all items are resolved.

items.description: List of content omissions. Add an item when you detect source content missing from nav.plain.html. Set resolved: true when you add it to nav.plain.html.

description.description: What is missing (e.g. 'Dealer search form', '2 icon cards (Agendamento de Serviço, Test Drive)')

resolved.description: Set to true when you have added this content to nav.plain.html

status.description: Alternative to resolved: 'pending' = not yet in nav.plain.html, 'resolved' = added
